146637.name: Moderate bleaching events (1-30% bleached)
146637.description: The number of moderate bleaching events (up to 30% of corals) measured at 100 fixed global locations.
146637.s_name: Hughes, T. P., et al. (2018). Spatial and temporal patterns of mass bleaching of corals in the Anthropocene. Science.

source.name: Hughes, T. P., et al. (2018). Spatial and temporal patterns of mass bleaching of corals in the Anthropocene. Science.
source.dataPublishedBy: Hughes, T. P., Anderson, K. D., Connolly, S. R., Heron, S. F., Kerry, J. T., Lough, J. M., ... & Wilson, S. K. (2018). Spatial and temporal patterns of mass bleaching of corals in the Anthropocene. Science, 359(6371), 80-83.
source.additionalInfo: The number of moderate bleaching events (up to 30% of corals) and severe bleaching events (more than 30% corals) measured at 100 fixed global locations.

146638.name: Severe bleaching events (>30% bleached)
146638.description: The number of severe bleaching events (more than 30% corals) measured at 100 fixed global locations.
146638.s_name: Hughes, T. P., et al. (2018). Spatial and temporal patterns of mass bleaching of corals in the Anthropocene. Science.

source.name: Hughes, T. P., et al. (2018). Spatial and temporal patterns of mass bleaching of corals in the Anthropocene. Science.

source.additionalInfo: The number of moderate bleaching events (up to 30% of corals) and severe bleaching events (more than 30% corals) measured at 100 fixed global locations.
